title: torilis nodosa var. bracteosa
intro: Torilis nodosa var. bracteosa, also known as the knotted hedge parsley or knotted chervil, is a plant species within the family Apiaceae. It is native to Europe and Western Asia, and its medicinal properties include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Torilis nodosa var. bracteosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments.
